name: ClawDrill
description: A massive, 90-meter-long drill operated by Red Helldivers.
mechanics: Requires a DC 20 Dexterity check for non-Helldivers to pilot.

name: GravBoots
description: Advanced anti-gravity footwear primarily used by Golds.
mechanics: Allows flight speed of 60 ft.

name: Razor
description: The signature weapon of the Gold Color. Transitions between whip and blade.
mechanics: Whip form has 10 ft reach, bonus action grapple. Illegal for non-Golds.

name: PulseFist
description: A gauntlet-mounted energy weapon.
mechanics: Stun (DC 15 CON save) or Kill (2d10 radiant damage).

name: PulseArmor
description: High-tech combat armor with a built-in PulseShield.
mechanics: Base AC 17. Shield absorbs first 20 points of damage per encounter.

name: Forged Sigil
description: A surgical implant spoofing BoQC scanners.
mechanics: Passes standard commercial manifest scans. Fails deep-scans.

name: Scorcher
description: Standard-issue energy sidearm.
mechanics: Ranged weapon (30/120 ft), 1d8 radiant damage.

name: WhisperCrystal
description: Translucent crystal encoded with a single-use voice message.
mechanics: Plays once at a whisper volume, then dissolves into dust.

name: IonBlade
description: An energy sword favored by highColors who cannot wield a Razor.
mechanics: Deals 1d8 slashing + 1d4 lightning damage.

name: SlingBlade
description: A curved, sickle-like Helldiver tool repurposed as a weapon.
mechanics: Deals 1d6 slashing damage. Symbol of Red rebellion.

name: StarShell
description: A 4-meter tall orbital drop mech suit used for Iron Rains.
mechanics: Grants immense strength and heavy weapons, but requires Gold-level training to pilot.

name: GhostCloak
description: Personal active camouflage device.
mechanics: Grants advantage on Stealth checks. Deactivates if the wearer attacks.

name: Recather
description: Advanced medical device for rapid cellular healing.
mechanics: Heals 4d8 HP over 1 minute. Highly illegal for lowColors.

name: Pitviper Venom
description: Deadly neurotoxin extracted from Martian pitvipers.
mechanics: DC 17 CON save. Failure causes paralysis and 3d10 poison damage.

name: Haemanthus Extract
description: Derivative of the Martian flower, used to induce a death-like coma.
mechanics: Target appears dead to basic medical scans for 24 hours.

name: Datadrop
description: Encrypted data storage drive used by Greens and the Syndicate.
mechanics: Requires Green tools to decrypt (DC 18 Intelligence).

name: Aegis
description: Heavy energy shield carried by elite Gray Lurchers.
mechanics: Provides +3 AC and resistance to energy attacks when deployed.

name: Stun Baton
description: Riot control weapon used by the Gray garrison.
mechanics: Deals 1d4 bludgeoning + 1d4 lightning. Target must make a DC 13 CON save or be stunned for 1 round.

name: RipWing
description: Small, agile atmospheric and void fighter craft.
mechanics: Armed with light scorchers and pulse missiles. Used for patrol and dogfighting.

name: TorchShip
description: Mid-to-large interplanetary transport and warship.
mechanics: Primary mode of transit between spheres. Navigated strictly by Blues.

name: LeechCraft
description: Stealth boarding pod designed to pierce ship hulls.
mechanics: Used by Obsidians, Grays, and the Sons for hostile ship takeovers.

name: EMP Grenade
description: Standard explosive for disabling PulseArmor and electronics.
mechanics: Disables PulseShields and electronic devices in a 20ft radius for 1 minute.

name: Stim-tab
description: Adrenaline stimulant used by Grays and lowColors for double-shifts.
mechanics: Removes exhaustion for 4 hours, but causes 1 level of exhaustion when it wears off.

name: Obsidian Ice-Axe
description: Primitive but devastating melee weapon favored by Stained.
mechanics: Deals 1d10 slashing/bludgeoning damage. Brutal criticals.

name: Aegis Gauntlet
description: A forearm-mounted energy shield used by Golds. Excellent for parrying kinetic and energy weapons in close quarters.
mechanics: Grants +2 to AC against melee and ranged attacks. Can perform a shield bash as a bonus action.

name: Omnivore Railgun Pistol
description: A specialized Black Market sidearm that uses an internal micro-forge to melt and shape any scrap metal into lethal projectiles on the fly.
mechanics: Ammunition can be created from any metallic object. Ignores resistance to kinetic damage.

name: Zoladone Injector
description: A powerful chemical agent used by Peerless Scarred and inquisitors to completely strip away empathy, fear, and pain.
mechanics: Advantage on saving throws against fear and charm effects for 1 hour. Disadvantage on all Charisma checks.

name: Snake Bite (Oil Change)
description: An extreme military stimulant cocktail used by elite Gray commandos to push far beyond human limits, with severe crashes.
mechanics: Grants Haste for 1 minute. Afterwards, user suffers 2 levels of exhaustion.

name: Obsidian Spirit Berries
description: A potent hallucinogen from the poles of Mars, used by Obsidians to commune with the gods or induce berserker trances.
mechanics: User gains resistance to bludgeoning damage but must attack the nearest creature each turn for 1 minute.

name: Tabula Rasa Chair
description: A highly illegal mind-wiping technology utilized by deep-state Gold operatives to erase or rewrite an individual's memories.
mechanics: Can fully rewrite a target's memories over 8 hours. Target must fail a DC 22 Wisdom save.

name: Learning Accelerant Drip
description: Intravenous chemicals used during Gold carving processes to allow the brain to absorb years of education in weeks.
mechanics: Halves the time required to learn a new skill or language during downtime.

name: Gold Star Shell
description: A localized spacecraft and powered armor used by Peerless Scarred for devastating Iron Rain orbital drops.
mechanics: Grants AC 20, a flying speed of 60 ft, and immunity to extreme environments.

name: Peerless GravBoots
description: Standard issue anti-gravity footwear for high-ranking Society members. Completely forbidden for lowColors.
mechanics: Allows hovering up to 30 feet and negates falling damage.

name: Lykos SlingBlade
description: A curved, hooked implement used by Red miners for harvesting Helium-3. Though a tool, it is lethal in desperate hands.
mechanics: 1d6 slashing damage. On a critical hit, the target is grappled or tripped.

name: Helium-3 Sonic Drill
description: Heavy industrial mining equipment from the deep mines of Mars. Emits a deafening sonic pulse to fracture rock.
mechanics: Can bore through 5 feet of solid rock per minute. Can be improvised as a weapon dealing 2d8 thunder damage.

name: Stained PulseAxe
description: A massive kinetic weapon designed specifically for the enormous, genetically enhanced Obsidian warriors.
mechanics: 2d12 slashing damage. Requires Strength 18 to wield effectively. On a hit, emits a shockwave pushing the target 5 feet.

name: Drachenjäger
description: A colossal, bipedal mech walker designed for devastating ground assaults and carrying wound-healing armor.
mechanics: Acts as a gargantuan vehicle. Equipped with heavy railguns and plasma cannons.

name: Lovelock Engine
description: Originally a terraforming device, these massive orbital engines can be weaponized to manipulate weather patterns.
mechanics: Can create localized storms, tornadoes, or extreme temperature shifts over a 10-mile radius.

name: Shadow Fleet Transponder
description: An illegal ship module used by Jackals and smugglers to mimic the signatures of destroyed or decommissioned Society ships.
mechanics: Grants advantage on checks made to bypass Society blockades and deep-space patrols.

name: Iron Rain Spit Tube
description: A high-velocity single-occupant insertion pod launched from capital ships to punch through planetary defenses.
mechanics: Carries one occupant to the surface at Mach speeds. Imposes a DC 15 Constitution save to avoid stunning on impact.

name: Volarus Griffin Amulet
description: A carved bone trinket belonging to the royal Obsidian line, broken as a pact when the Valkyrie sold their sons to the Golds.
mechanics: Grants advantage on Persuasion or Intimidation checks against Obsidians of the Spires.

name: Master of the Sun Razor
description: The pinnacle of pre-Rising metallurgy. A chemical-tempered whip that can instantly harden into an unbreakable blade.
mechanics: 1d8 slashing damage. As a bonus action, changes from a 10-foot reach whip to a longsword. Scores a critical hit on a 19 or 20.
